info.name: Asana Allocations API
info.description:
The Asana Allocations API allows users to manage and allocate resources within their Asana project management system. An allocation object represents how much of a resource (e.g. person, team) is dedicated to a specific work object (e.g. project, portfolio) over a specific period of time. The effort value can be a percentage or number of hours.

Contact Support:
 Name: Asana Support

query.description: Comma-separated list of optional fields to include.

variable.description: (Required) Globally unique identifier for the allocation.

request.description: Returns the complete allocation record for a single allocation.

response.name: Successfully retrieved the record for a single allocation.
